entry.title: New IDC FA870215D0001 awarded to MASSACHUSETTS INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF MASSACHUSETTS INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY - LINCOLN LABORATORY, FEDERALLY FUNDED RESEARCH&DEVELOPMENT CENTER

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: ELECTRONICS/COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT (BASIC RESEARCH)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
